CheckIn.title: CheckIn
CheckIn.description: A student's check-in record for the event.

uid.description: The Google Auth UID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

fullName.description: The full name of the student.

latitude.description: Latitude of the user when checking in.

longitude.description: Longitude of the user when checking in.

/checkins/{uid}.description: Stores check-in records, keyed by the user's UID to ensure one check-in per account.
